text: God says: Do not worry about tomorrow, for tomorrow will worry about itself. Trust in my timing and my plan for your life.
When you feel like you are drowning in life, remember that your creator is the master of the seas. He will never let you sink.
Faith is not about everything turning out okay. Faith is about being okay no matter how things turn out, because God is with you.
Your current situation is not your final destination. God has a greater purpose for your journey. Keep moving forward.
The same God who created the stars and the mountains thought the world needed one of you. You are loved beyond measure.
